title: astronidium glabrum
intro: Astronidium glabrum, also known as the Glabrous Astronidium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Diapensiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, Astronidium glabrum has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Astronidium glabrum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Astronidium glabrum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its roots and leaves can be used separately or combined in herbal remedies.
